## Plugin Submission

**Plugin ID:** `io.github.logsquirl.___`
**Version:** `x.y.z`
**Platforms:** macOS / Linux / Windows

### Checklist

- [ ] Entry added to `plugins.json` with all required fields
- [ ] `id` uses reverse-DNS notation (e.g. `io.github.logsquirl.myplugin`)
- [ ] `version` follows [SemVer](https://semver.org/) (e.g. `1.0.0`)
- [ ] `download_url` points to an HTTPS URL (GitHub Release asset preferred)
- [ ] `sha256` contains the SHA-256 hash of the ZIP file
- [ ] `platforms` lists only supported values: `macos`, `linux`, `windows`
- [ ] `api_version` matches the plugin API version the plugin was built against
- [ ] CI validation passes

### Description

<!-- Briefly describe what this plugin does and why it should be listed. -->
